intake.user_request: Build a read-only data API that serves index.json, graph.json, and RAG vector metadata in normalized formats the dashboard Intelligence tab can consume. Expose layer distribution, complexity scores, edge lists, coverage metrics, in-degree rankings, and element search.

classification.plan_type_rationale: New HTTP server module with 5 endpoints reading from .coderef artifacts. Multi-phase: server setup → endpoint implementation → integration. No invasive pipeline changes — read-only consumers. Fits phased: concrete deliverables per phase, milestone gates between.

in_scope: GET /api/intelligence/summary — layer distribution, coverage %, complexity histogram, stale count
GET /api/intelligence/elements — paginated element list with complexity, layer, capability, elementType, test coverage
GET /api/intelligence/edges — edge list for call graph rendering
GET /api/intelligence/coverage-gaps — elements sorted by complexity desc where tested=false
out_of_scope: Existing rag-server modification (new server, not extension)

constraints: Read-only access to .coderef/ artifacts — no pipeline code changes
Must start cleanly alongside existing rag-server on :52849
All endpoints must return valid JSON
Instance 1 of 2 on STUB-282 — Instance 2 owns scatter/treemap/sankey/UMAP
